title: Best Probiotics for Women Over 40: What to Look For (And What to Avoid)
seo_title: Best Probiotics for Women Over 40: What to Look For
meta_description: Discover which probiotic strains actually work for women over 40, why the microbiome changes after menopause, and what to avoid in a supplement.
tags: probiotics, gut health, women over 40, microbiome, digestion, bloating, Happiest Gut
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: The gut microbiome shifts significantly after 40 because estrogen directly shapes which bacteria thrive. This guide breaks down the strains that matter, what CFU count to look for, and why a prebiotic-probiotic combination outperforms probiotics alone.
